_comment: Human-gate drafts for Postiz. type must remain draft. Fill integration IDs after Ryan connects TikTok/YouTube. Media paths must be uploaded via `postiz upload` first — never raw filesystem paths at publish time.

posts.caption:
Cannae, night of the victory. Maharbal: five days to Rome. Hannibal: no.
Not a vibes take — a strategic theory of war.
📗 Documented baseline. Sources in bio.
#history #althistory #hannibal #cannae #fyp

posts.title: After Cannae, Maharbal begged to ride on Rome. Hannibal said no.
posts.caption:
On the night of 2 August 216 BC, after Cannae, Maharbal proposed a cavalry march on Rome. Hannibal refused.

📗 Documented baseline · Livy 22, Polybius 3
Series: ANOR Fork / ELOSTIRION

#history #althistory #hannibal #cannae

posts.caption:
1962. Submarine B-59. Nuclear torpedo. One man refuses.
📗 Documented. Not a movie twist — a near miss.
#history #coldwar #arkhipov #fyp

posts.title: One vote on a Soviet submarine may have saved the world (1962)
posts.caption:
27 October 1962. B-59. Heat, depth charges, incomplete information.
Documented path: Arkhipov refuses. The boat surfaces.

📗 Public historical literature · ANOR Fork series

#cubanmissilecrisis #arkhipov #coldwar
